arts.ttl: Arsenal sent new Joshua Kimmich message as firm answer given on Bayern contract talks
arts.sum: Joshua Kimmich has emerged as a top target for Arsenal as his contract negotiations with Bayern Munich continue to stall, with further talks having taken place over the weekend

arts.ttl: Paul Merson makes new Arsenal Premier League title prediction and explains Liverpool 'lesson'
arts.sum: Paul Merson has suggested it's game over for Arsenal in their fight for the Premier League title with league leaders Liverpool affording 'three or four slip-ups.' At one point, it appeared as if his old club were going to challenge Arne Slot's side all the way but that has changed in recent weeks, following the defeat and draw to West Ham and Nottingham Forest respectively.

arts.ttl: Beating PSV Eindhoven will ‘change Arsenal narrative’ insists Jurriën Timber
arts.sum: Netherlands defender confident ahead of last-16 Euro tie Midfielder Merino set to continue as makeshift striker Jurriën Timber has said Arsenal have an opportunity to “change the narrative” of their season against PSV Eindhoven and believes they have the motivation to reach the Champions League quarter-finals for a second successive season. Mikel Arteta’s side face the Dutch champions in the first leg of their last-16 tie on Tuesday night having fallen off the pace in the Premier League title race after failing to score in their past two matches against West Ham and Nottingham Forest. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Jurrien Timber issues three-word rallying cry to his Arsenal team-mates ahead of their Champions League return at PSV
arts.sum: The Gunners have faced criticism after a real struggle to score goals following injuries to Bukayo Saka, Gabriel Martinelli, Kai Havertz and Gabriel Jesus.

arts.ttl: Team News: PSV Eindhoven vs. Arsenal injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Tuesday's Champions League clash between PSV Eindhoven and Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Jurrien Timber tells Arsenal team-mates it's time to 'change the narrative'
arts.sum: Arsenal face PSV Eindhoven in the Netherlands in the first leg of their Champions League last 16 tie, with former Ajax defender Jurrien Timber set for a volatile reception at the Phillips Stadion

arts.ttl: Arteta: Arsenal can still go to a 'different level'
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has insisted that Arsenal still have "gears to take the game to a different level" despite their injury crisis.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Osimhen TRUTH, Arsenal’s TOP TARGET, Chelsea DEAL DONE
arts.sum: Fabrizio Romano transfer news: Osimhen TRUTH, Arsenal’s TOP TARGET, Chelsea DEAL DONE Fabrizio Romano has provided the latest transfer news and rumours from Manchester United, Arsenal, Chelsea and more.

arts.ttl: Arsenal’s season on the line at PSV - can the attack be fixed?
arts.sum: At the start of February, Arsenal thumped Manchester City 5-1 in a real statement of intent for the run-in. March, however, begins on a very different footing.

arts.ttl: Jurrien Timber provides 'easy' solution to biggest Arsenal weakness ahead of Champions League showdown
arts.sum: The Gunners have failed to score in their last two games which has seen them lose ground in the Premier League title race
